data.task:
ATOM 0 (ADR-first gate) of the GO PERSONAS surface-reduction cut. Author ONE new append-only ADR and ONLY the ADR in this atom — do NOT touch packages/personas/base/**, assignments.json, ARCHITECTURE.md, or any Play files yet (those are later atoms gated behind this ADR existing).

WHAT TO CREATE:
- New file `cocoder/decisions/0033-testing-as-a-play-capability.md`. Match the exact format/structure of an existing recent ADR — read `cocoder/decisions/0032-retire-playbooks-genre.md` and `cocoder/decisions/0031-architecture-reading-contract.md` first and mirror their header (Title, **Status:** Accepted, **Date:** 2026-06-21, Context/Decision/Consequences or whatever section shape those use) and prose density.
- Add the one-line index entry to `cocoder/decisions/README.md` in the same style as the 0030/0031/0032 entries (keep the supersession/feeds notes consistent with how that README lists ADRs).

DECISION THE ADR MUST RECORD (founder-ratified 2026-06-21, GO PERSONAS):
1. Testing is a Play CAPABILITY available to ALL personas, not a persona. Acceptance/contract-QA and test authoring/execution are expressed as function-named base Plays (e.g. `write-tests`, `run-tests`), callable by every persona.
2. The `Talia` persona is RETIRED (designed-but-never-dispatched: assignments.json gave it cli:""/model:"", no live Play named it as caller). Its acceptance-QA function moves to the test Plays.
3. `Quinn` is RETAINED as `real` — the autonomous experience-QA persona that exercises the running app, tracks bugs, and runs cross-machine (Mac + Windows-over-SSH). The earlier run_172 fold-both verdict is superseded by this founder override; this ADR records the split (retire Talia, keep Quinn).
4. Net base persona count becomes 5 (Oz / Oscar / Bob / Deb / Quinn). Ian/Phil remain custom-persona examples, not base.
5. This ADR supersedes the relevant persona-model line that treated acceptance-QA as a standalone persona; reference ADR-0005 (personas-and-subtasks) and ADR-0028 (play-taxonomy) as the surfaces it amends. Follow the ADR-0014 living-ADR convention (append-only; amend-in-place with banners, do not delete history).

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- `cocoder/decisions/0033-testing-as-a-play-capability.md` exists, Accepted, dated 2026-06-21, and clearly states all 5 points above in the house ADR style.
- `cocoder/decisions/README.md` has a new 0033 index line consistent with surrounding entries.
- NOTHING ELSE is modified — git diff shows only those two files. No persona files, no Plays, no assignments.json, no ARCHITECTURE.md in this atom.
- `node scripts/check-topology.mjs` and `pnpm -r typecheck` stay green (this atom is docs-only so neither should be affected, but confirm you did not break the decisions index).

Write-scope for this atom: cocoder/decisions/** ONLY.

data.text: You seem stalled — what is blocking you? Keep going, or say what you need.

data.reason: ADR-0033 created (Accepted 2026-06-21) recording all 5 points (testing-as-Play, Talia retired, Quinn real, count=5, supersedes 0005/amends 0028); README index line consistent; diff is ADR+README only, no persona/Play/assignments edits; topology + pnpm -r typecheck green.

data.task:
ATOM 1 of GO PERSONAS (ADR-0033 has landed, c5dafd2 — it authorizes this). Create the two function-named testing Plays. Do NOT touch any persona file, assignments.json, or talia.md in this atom (Talia retirement is Atom 2). Scope: packages/personas/base/plays/** + scripts/checks/** + the test(s) that pin the base Play catalog.

FIRST read these to match conventions exactly: packages/core/src/plays/types.ts (the Play schema), packages/personas/base/plays/code-review.md and electron-test.md (frontmatter + body style), and scripts/checks/code-review-preflight.mjs (deterministicStep wrapper pattern + exit-code/output contract).

HARD SCHEMA FACTS (verified — do not deviate):
- `executionModel` enum is ONLY 'prompt-only' | 'hybrid'. There is NO 'prompt'. Use those exact strings.
- `allowedCallers` is enforced by literal Array.includes(caller) in packages/core/src/plays/request.ts:68 and manifest.ts:10 — THERE IS NO WILDCARD. You MUST enumerate every base persona explicitly. Use exactly: oz, oscar, bob, deb, quinn. (Do NOT add talia; do NOT use '*'.)
- `triggerClass` for both = 'persona-requested'.

CREATE Play 1 — `packages/personas/base/plays/write-tests.md`:
- Frontmatter: id: write-tests; label: Write tests; kind: headless; executionModel: prompt-only; triggerClass: persona-requested; purpose: <one line — author tests for a target area>; allowedCallers: oz/oscar/bob/deb/quinn (enumerated); writeScope: ['tests/**', '**/*.test.*', '**/*.spec.*'].
- Body: a function-named test-AUTHORING procedure callable by any persona — describe writing/extending tests for a named target, matching surrounding code style, not weakening existing assertions. Mirror the prose density of the existing Plays. Do NOT name it after or reference 'Talia'.

CREATE Play 2 — `packages/personas/base/plays/run-tests.md`:
- Frontmatter: id: run-tests; label: Run tests; kind: headless; executionModel: hybrid; triggerClass: persona-requested; purpose: <one line — run the repo test command and triage results>; deterministicStep: scripts/checks/run-tests-preflight.mjs; allowedCallers: oz/oscar/bob/deb/quinn (enumerated); writeScope: [] (read-only triage).
- Body: deterministic step runs the repo test command; LLM step ONLY triages failures into a structured pass/fail + evidence. Mirror code-review.md's hybrid framing.
- Create `scripts/checks/run-tests-preflight.mjs` mirroring scripts/checks/code-review-preflight.mjs's structure and exit-code/stdout contract, but invoking the repo's existing test command (reuse the canonical test invocation the repo already uses — e.g. the same `pnpm` test script the suites run under; do NOT fork or reimplement a second test runner).

INTEGRATION-VERIFY RECONCILIATION — DELINEATE, do NOT merge or weaken. integration-verify is NOT a base catalog Play; it is the ADR-0023 commit-spine LANDING GATE machinery (landRunBranch -> runIntegrationVerify, lifecycle-triggered, opt-in isolation path). It is a load-bearing safeguard and must NOT be touched, merged, or deleted. In run-tests.md's body, add one clear sentence distinguishing the two: run-tests is a persona-requested catalog capability that runs the test command + triages; integration-verify remains the lifecycle landing gate on the commit spine. There must be exactly ONE persona-callable test-run catalog Play (run-tests); that is satisfied because integration-verify is not a catalog Play. Do not create overlap.

UPDATE THE CATALOG PIN: packages/personas/tests/base-personas.test.ts (and any other test enumerating the base Play set, e.g. packages/core/tests/plays*.test.ts) must include the two new Plays so the catalog assertion stays green. Find every test that pins the base Play list and add write-tests + run-tests.

ACCEPTANCE / must stay green:
- write-tests.md and run-tests.md exist with the exact frontmatter above; both load without schema error.
- allowedCallers on both enumerates oz/oscar/bob/deb/quinn (no wildcard, no talia).
- run-tests is hybrid with a working deterministicStep script that reuses the repo test command; write-tests is prompt-only with the tests write-scope.
- No persona file, assignments.json, or talia.md changed in this atom.
- `pnpm --filter @cocoder/personas test` (base-personas) green; `pnpm --filter @cocoder/core test` plays suites green; `pnpm -r typecheck` green; `node scripts/check-topology.mjs` green.

data.text: You seem stalled — what is blocking you? Keep going, or say what you need.

data.reason: write-tests (prompt-only, tests writeScope) + run-tests (hybrid, run-tests-preflight.mjs reusing pnpm -r test, writeScope []) created with allowedCallers enumerating oz/oscar/bob/deb/quinn (no wildcard/talia); integration-verify delineated not merged; catalog pins + new assertions added; no persona/assignments edits; personas 23/23, core 447/447, topology + pnpm -r typecheck green.

data.task:
ATOM 2 of GO PERSONAS (ADR-0033 landed c5dafd2; the two test Plays landed dc80370). Retire the Talia persona from ALL LIVE surfaces and retarget its function to the new test Plays. The base persona set becomes 5: Oz, Oscar, Bob, Deb, Quinn. Quinn is UNTOUCHED (keep it exactly as-is). Do NOT delete quinn.md or change its content beyond removing any Talia cross-reference sentence.

DELETE / REMOVE (live):
1. Delete `packages/personas/base/talia.md`.
2. Remove the entire `talia` block from `cocoder/personas/assignments.json` (starts ~line 84). Leave valid JSON.
3. `ARCHITECTURE.md` Persona Boundaries table (~line 241-250): remove the **Talia** row; ensure the surrounding prose/count reads as 5 base personas (Oz/Oscar/Bob/Deb/Quinn). If a Talia capability sentence remains, retarget it to: testing is now a Play capability (write-tests / run-tests) any persona can invoke.

RETARGET live references (Talia -> 'testing is a Play capability (write-tests/run-tests), see ADR-0033'; do NOT leave Talia named as a live persona):
- Base persona cross-refs: `packages/personas/base/deb.md`, `packages/personas/base/quinn.md` (only remove/retarget the Talia mention; do not otherwise edit Quinn).
- Runtime: `packages/core/src/runner/prompts.ts` (remove Talia from any persona enumeration/prompt text).
- UI: `packages/ui/src/renderer/seed.json`, `packages/ui/src/renderer/adapter.ts`, `packages/ui/src/renderer/sections/Personas.tsx`, `packages/ui/src/renderer/sections/modals.tsx`, `packages/ui/fixtures/priorities.json` — remove Talia as a listed/seeded persona so the UI shows the 5 live personas.
- Proof/scripts: `scripts/proof-plays.mjs` — retarget any Talia assertion to the test Plays / 5-persona set.
- Docs: `docs/personas.md`, `docs/orchestration.md`, `docs/orchestration-contract-ownership.md`, `docs/custom-personas.md` — retarget Talia to the test-Play capability + ADR-0033; fix any persona count.
- AGENTS surfaces: `AGENTS.md`, `cocoder/AGENTS.md`, `cocoder/personas/AGENTS.md`, `cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md`, `templates/playbooks/new-workspace-setup.md`.

UPDATE every test that enumerates personas so suites stay green (remove Talia, adjust counts/lists):
- `packages/personas/tests/base-personas.test.ts` (remove 'talia.md' from BASE_PERSONA_FILES and FRONTMATTER_PERSONA_FILES).
- `packages/core/tests/personas-merge.test.ts`, `packages/core/tests/personas-effective.test.ts`, `packages/core/tests/personas-list-effective.test.ts`.
- `packages/daemon/tests/read-surfaces.test.ts`.
- UI tests: `packages/ui/tests/adapter.test.ts`, `packages/ui/tests/app.test.tsx`.

LEAVE UNCHANGED (history / examples / governance that intentionally name Talia — do NOT edit these):
- Anything under `cocoder/zArchive/**`.
- `cocoder/SESSION_LOG.md`, `cocoder/SESSION_LOG_ARCHIVE.md`.
- `cocoder/priorities/surface-reduction.md` (this priority doc — Oscar owns it), `cocoder/priorities/archive/**`, `cocoder/priorities/backlog/quinn-app-testing.md`, `cocoder/tickets/closed/**`.
- ADRs as append-only history: `cocoder/decisions/0012-living-base-personas.md` (do not rewrite a past ADR), `cocoder/decisions/0033-testing-as-a-play-capability.md` and `cocoder/decisions/README.md` (they intentionally RECORD the retirement — keep their Talia mentions).
- `examples/personas/phil-primitive-builder/**` (custom-persona EXAMPLE artifact — leave as-is).
- UI `packages/ui/design-ref/**` (frozen design-reference artifacts, not live app code) — leave unless a referenced file is imported by live src (it is not).

ACCEPTANCE / must stay green:
- `packages/personas/base/talia.md` is gone; no `talia` key in assignments.json; ARCHITECTURE persona table shows 5 personas (no Talia row).
- FINAL GATE GREP must return ZERO live hits (only the allow-listed history/example surfaces above may still contain 'talia'): run `rg -li 'talia' packages/personas/base packages/core/src packages/daemon/src packages/ui/src packages/ui/fixtures scripts docs ARCHITECTURE.md AGENTS.md cocoder/AGENTS.md cocoder/personas/AGENTS.md cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md templates` and confirm it is empty.
- Suites green: `pnpm --filter @cocoder/personas test`, `pnpm --filter @cocoder/core test`, `pnpm --filter @cocoder/daemon test`, `pnpm --filter @cocoder/ui test`.
- `pnpm -r typecheck` green; `node scripts/check-topology.mjs` green; `node scripts/proof-plays.mjs` passes.

data.reason: talia.md deleted; assignments now 5 personas (oz/oscar/bob/deb/quinn, valid JSON); ARCHITECTURE table de-Talia'd with 'base set is five' note; runtime/UI/docs/AGENTS/proof retargeted; live grep gate empty (history/examples untouched); personas 23 / core 447 / daemon 236 / UI 156, pnpm -r typecheck, topology, proof-plays all green.

data.outcome: ✅ COMMITTED on `main` — 5 commit(s) on the active branch (no landing step; work is on the branch by construction). Committed out-of-lane (flagged, NOT held back): cocoder/decisions/README.md, cocoder/decisions/0033-testing-as-a-play-capability.md, scripts/checks/run-tests-preflight.mjs, AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, cocoder/AGENTS.md, cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md, cocoder/personas/AGENTS.md, cocoder/personas/assignments.json, docs/custom-personas.md, docs/orchestration-contract-ownership.md, docs/orchestration.md, docs/personas.md, scripts/proof-plays.mjs, templates/playbooks/new-workspace-setup.md.
